title: HistRegGUI: Multiplatform Histological Image Registration with DeeperHistReg
description: HistRegGUI is a desktop interface for histological image registration with DeeperHistReg. It supports registering one or multiple moving images to the same fixed target, CPU and optional NVIDIA CUDA execution, automatic and manual image-reader selection, batch manifests, and packaged applications for Windows, Linux, macOS Intel, and macOS Apple Silicon.
